context: Tests whether the agent can extract a structured ubiquitous language glossary from domain user stories, correctly identifying entities, value objects, commands, domain events, and bounded context candidates as prescribed by the ddd-ubiquitous-language skill.

checklist.name: Entities section present
checklist.description: The output includes an Entities section that lists at least Loan, Borrower, and LoanApplication as distinct entities with identity

checklist.name: Value Objects section present
checklist.description: The output includes a Value Objects section with at least CreditScore, Installment (or InstallmentAmount), and PrepaymentPenalty

checklist.name: Commands identified
checklist.description: The Commands section lists at least 4 commands derived from story verbs: Originate, Disburse, Approve/Decline/Defer, FlagAsDefaulted

checklist.name: Domain Events identified
checklist.description: The Domain Events section lists at least 3 events such as LoanOriginated, LoanApproved, FundsDisbursed, or LoanDefaulted

checklist.name: Bounded Context candidates
checklist.description: The output proposes at least 2 bounded context groupings (e.g. Origination, Underwriting, Disbursement, Collections)

checklist.name: Source stories referenced
checklist.description: Each term references the story number(s) it appears in

checklist.name: Domain language in definitions
checklist.description: Definitions use business/domain language and avoid technical implementation details (e.g. no mention of database, ActiveRecord, class)

checklist.name: Markdown structure
checklist.description: Output is saved in docs/ubiquitous_language.md and uses proper Markdown headings for each section

checklist.name: No invented terms
checklist.description: The glossary does not introduce entities or events not grounded in the provided stories

checklist.name: English only
checklist.description: All text in the glossary (terms, definitions, annotations) is written in English

checklist.name: Collections workflow captured
checklist.description: The DefaultHandling / Collections concept from Story 6 is represented — either as a bounded context candidate or a Command/Event
